title: Fermented Vegetarian Fermented Vermicelli Rice Noodles Stir-fry
description: A post-workout Venezuelan dish featuring roasted and raw-friendly fermented vermicelli rice noodles with a blend of vegetables and spices for an enjoyable and nutritious meal.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Blend (bell peppers, carrots, onions, mushrooms)

instructions: Rinse and soak the fermented vermicelli rice noodles in water for at least 30 minutes.
Dry them on a clean kitchen towel, then chop them into bite-sized pieces.
In a large skillet, heat some oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped vermicelli, followed by sliced garlic and chili pepper.
Sauté until the vermicelli is lightly toasted and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Add in the vegetable blend and stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes until they are slightly softened but still crunchy.
Season with salt to taste. Serve hot.
